zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude Tyrrell於1501年出生在英國哈普爾賀隆時，她的父親Sir John Tyrrell23歲，母親Ann Norreys19歲。她於1530年與William Petrie在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1541年5月28日在英國艾可享年40歲，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude Tyrrell于1501年出生在英国哈普爾賀隆时，她的父亲Sir John Tyrrell23岁，母亲Ann Norreys19岁。她于1530年与William Petrie在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1541年5月28日在英国艾可享年40岁，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude Tyrrell was born in 1501, in Heron, Hampshire, England, her father, Sir John Tyrrell, was 23 and her mother, Ann Norreys, was 19. She married William Petrie in 1530, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 28 May 1541, in Essex, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude Tyrrell est née en 1501, à Heron, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Tyrrell, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ann Norreys, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Petrie en 1530, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1541, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude Tyrrell 1501 in Heron, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Tyrrell 23 und ihre Mutter Ann Norreys 19. Sie hat 1530 in Essex, England, United Kingdom William Petrie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Mai 1541 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Essex, England begraben.

Lei sposato William Petrie nel 1530, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1541, nel Essex, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude Tyrrellが1501年にイギリスハンプシュアイアハーオンで生まれた時，父Sir John Tyrrellは23歳，母Ann Norreysは19歳であった。1530年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでWilliam Petrieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1541年5月28日にイギリスエセックスで40歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude Tyrrell(이)가 1501년 영국 함프실르 허에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Tyrrell(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Norreys(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 William Petrie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1541년 5월 28일 영국 에세스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude Tyrrell родилась в 1501 г. в местности хирон, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Tyrrell было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Norreys, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Petrie в 1530 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 28 мая 1541 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности эссекс, Англия.
